ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the data was collected */,
  "crim" REAL /* Crime rate per capita */,
  "zn" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "tax" REAL /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "medv" REAL /* Median house prices in $1000's */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., crime rate, zoning laws) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used to make the prediction */,
  "predicted_medv" REAL /* Predicted median house price in $1000's */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used to make the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the crime rate was measured */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per capita */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning_laws" (
  "zoning_law_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning law */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the zoning law was implemented */,
  "zoning_law" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_law_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zoning_laws_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industrial_data" (
  "industrial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industrial data point */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the industrial data was collected */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Type of industry (e.g., manufacturing, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industrial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industrial_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nox_levels" (
  "nox_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nitrogen oxide level */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the nitrogen oxide level was measured */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the nitrogen oxide data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nox_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nox_levels_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_features" (
  "housing_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing feature */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the housing feature was collected */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of housing feature (e.g., rooms, age) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_features_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
